summary: A compiled montage posted by the account. The sampled frames include an outdoor scene of a man with light hair in a dark suit and red tie walking on a red carpet alongside another man in a suit, with a large aircraft and uniformed personnel behind them; a shot of a black armored limousine flying small flags arriving on a cobbled courtyard with a red carpet; and a title card of a line-drawn White House facade with the words 'THE WHITE HOUSE'. The clip cuts between several short scenes.

script.scene: Outdoors, a man in a dark suit and red tie walks on a red carpet beside another man in a suit, with a large jet and uniformed personnel behind them.
A black armored limousine flying small flags is parked or arriving on a cobbled courtyard with a red carpet, a person in a suit standing to the right.
A closing title card shows a line-drawn White House facade with the text 'THE WHITE HOUSE'.
